summary: Dashboard Bug Fix Verification - ALL TESTS PASSED. Verified: 1) 'Turnos Abiertos' card now shows correct value (1) from Supabase pos_sessions instead of 0 from empty MongoDB shifts collection, 2) Payment breakdown section has 4 cards (Tarjeta, Transferencia, Propinas, Facturas) with no blank spaces - Facturas card was added to fix the blank card issue, 3) Operations section has 6 cards evenly distributed, 4) Grid layouts correct (grid-cols-2 mobile, grid-cols-4 desktop for payments; grid-cols-2/3/6 for operations), 5) Dashboard auto-refreshes every 15 seconds.

tests.name: Dashboard has operations section with all fields
tests.details: occupancy_pct, occupied_tables, total_tables, active_orders, open_shifts, inventory_alerts

tests.name: Dashboard has today section with bills_count
Payment breakdown fields present
tests.details: card, transfer, tips, cash all present

tests.name: Operations section has 6 cards
tests.details: Descuentos, Ordenes Activas, Anulaciones, Turnos Abiertos, Alertas Inventario, Clientes Fidelidad

tests.name: Grid layouts correct
tests.details: Payment: grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4, Operations: grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-6

turnos_abiertos_shows_0.root_cause: Dashboard queried MongoDB 'shifts' collection (empty) while Caja/Turnos uses Supabase 'pos_sessions' table
turnos_abiertos_shows_0.fix_applied: Backend now queries Supabase pos_sessions with status='open' and falls back to MongoDB if Supabase unavailable
turnos_abiertos_shows_0.verification: API returns open_shifts=1, UI displays '1 Turnos Abiertos'

blank_card_next_to_propinas.root_cause: 3 items in grid-cols-2 layout left Propinas card alone on its row
blank_card_next_to_propinas.fix_applied: Added 4th 'Facturas' card showing bills_count, changed grid from grid-cols-3 to grid-cols-4
blank_card_next_to_propinas.verification: Payment breakdown now shows 4 cards: Tarjeta, Transferencia, Propinas, Facturas

context_for_next_testing_agent: Dashboard bug fixes verified. Turnos Abiertos now correctly queries Supabase pos_sessions (same as Caja/Turnos screen). Payment breakdown has 4 cards (Facturas card added). Operations section has 6 cards. All grids responsive. Auto-refresh every 15 seconds working.

issue_1.symptom: Turnos Abiertos card showed 0 even with active shift
issue_1.root_cause: Dashboard queried MongoDB 'shifts' collection which was empty, while Caja/Turnos screen uses Supabase 'pos_sessions' table
issue_1.fix: Modified /app/backend/routers/reports.py lines 156-166 to query Supabase pos_sessions with status='open' and fallback to MongoDB

issue_2.symptom: Blank card appeared next to Propinas in payment breakdown
issue_2.root_cause: 3 cards (Tarjeta, Transferencia, Propinas) in grid-cols-2 layout caused Propinas to be alone on row 2
issue_2.fix: Added 4th 'Facturas' card and changed grid from grid-cols-3 to grid-cols-4 in /app/frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.js line 99
